narrative:
Centerville-M (precinct in Montgomery County) has 997 registered voters, with 43.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.3 percentage points.
